heading: Additional compensation for dependents
label: 1135 Additional compensation for dependents
text: Any veteran entitled to compensation at the rates provided in , and whose disability is rated not less than 30 percent, shall be entitled to additional monthly compensation for dependents as provided in .section 1134 of this titlesection 1115 of this title
notes: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 335 of this title, substituted “1134” for “334” and “1115” for “315”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(c)(1)1984— substituted “30 percent” for “50 per centum”.Pub. L. 98–5431972— substituted provisions that the veteran be entitled to additional monthly compensation for dependents as provided in , for provisions that the veteran be entitled to additional monthly compensation for dependents equal to 80% of the additional compensation for dependents provided in , and subject to the limitations thereof, and adjusted upward or downward to the nearest dollar.Pub. L. 92–328section 315 of this titlesection 315 of this title

Effective Date of 1984 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 98–543, title I, § 112(b)98 Stat. 2740Oct. 24, 1984“The amendment made by subsection (a) [amending this section] shall take effect as of .”October 1, 1978
Effective Date of 1972 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 92–328section 301(b) of Pub. L. 92–328section 1134 of this titleJuly 1, 1973
